user_query:
I need a precise Four Pillars (BaZi) analysis for three people. Please read input/people.json (array of 3 records, each with: name, date in YYYY-MM-DD, time in HH:MM 24h, lat, lon, and gender as "male" or "female"). For each person, calculate the BaZi chart using true solar time correction based on the provided coordinates, identify the day master, analyze the five-element balance, list major branch/stem relationships (combine/clash/harm as applicable), and compute the 8 major luck periods with start age and direction.

Deliverables:
1) Write output/charts.json as a JSON array of 3 objects. For each object, use this schema:
{
  "name": string,
  "birth": {"date": "YYYY-MM-DD", "time": "HH:MM", "lat": number, "lon": number, "gender": "male"|"female"},
  "pillars": {
    "year": {"stem": string, "branch": string, "hidden_stems": [string, ...]},
    "month": {"stem": string, "branch": string, "hidden_stems": [string, ...]},
    "day": {"stem": string, "branch": string, "hidden_stems": [string, ...]},
    "hour": {"stem": string, "branch": string, "hidden_stems": [string, ...]}
  },
  "day_master": string,  // must equal pillars.day.stem
  "five_elements": {
    "wood": {"score": number, "percent": "NN%"},
    "fire": {"score": number, "percent": "NN%"},
    "earth": {"score": number, "percent": "NN%"},
    "metal": {"score": number, "percent": "NN%"},
    "water": {"score": number, "percent": "NN%"}
  },
  "major_luck": {
    "start_age": number,
    "direction": string,  // forward/reverse in your chosen phrasing
    "periods": [
      {"age": "A-B", "years": "YYYY-YYYY", "stem": string, "branch": string},
      ... exactly 8 items total ...
    ]
  },
  "relationships": [
    {"type": string, "positions": [string, ...], "result": string},
    ... zero or more entries ...
  ]
}
Ensure numeric fields are numbers, and each five_elements.percent ends with "%".

2) Write output/report.md. For each person, include:
- the name and the day master,
- a concise explanation of day master strength (strong/weak and why, considering season/month support, production/support, and hidden stems),
- a readable summary of the five-element balance (who is abundant/deficient),
- notable combine/clash/harm relationships and what they imply,
- a short interpretation of the first two major luck periods.
If you had to make any assumptions (e.g., rounding for true solar time), note them briefly.

3) Write output/consistency.csv with header:
name,day_master,month_branch
and one line per person. The day_master must equal pillars.day.stem and month_branch must equal pillars.month.branch from output/charts.json.

Use only workspace-relative paths (read input/people.json, write to output/...). Do not place files elsewhere. Make sure all three people are processed and the files are internally consistent.
